Anthropic urges 'temporary pause' on AI development to discuss risks
->The Guardian | More on "Anthropic AI pause safety risks" at BigEarthData.ai | #Anthropic #ArtificialIntelligence #AI

external.description: Anthropic has floated the idea of a worldwide “temporary pause” on AI development – and said it was going to convene “policymakers” to discuss the dangers of advanced AI – in its latest release touting the capabilities of its products. In a long post on Thursday, Anthropic detailed the progress of its AI model, Claude, towards “recursive self improvement” – that is, being able to make better and more powerful versions of itself. Recursive self-improvement is a bugbear of AI safety researchers, viewed as the key step for AI to become superintelligent and therefore unleash widespread consequences on humanity. The idea features heavily in the widely read AI 2027 doomsday scenario of last year, which imagines AI agents designing more and more intelligent versions of themselves, one of which eventually kills all of humanity with a bioweapon in order to make room for more datacentres and solar panels. Anthropic’s post notes a “trend” of increasing capability in Claude which, “taken far enough and given enough compute … points to an AI system capable of fully autonomously designing and developing its own successor”. This, Anthropic said, may increase the risk of “humans losing control over AI systems”. To deal with this,...
external.title: Anthropic urges 'temporary pause' on AI development to discuss risks

record.text:
Menorca - Birding in the Balearics II
->10,000 Birds | More on "Menorca birding wildlife species decline" at BigEarthData.ai | #Birding

external.description: Waking to the sound of purring Turtle Doves, singing Nightingales and calling Hoopoes was one of the delights of my recent visit to Menorca. Here in the UK Turtle Doves have declined by over 90% in the last 30 years, so they are now rare birds. Not so in Menorca, where they remain common and widespread. In England we are the very northern edge of the range of the Nightingale, but they are one of the commonest birds on Menorca, and you can hear their wonderful song almost anywhere on the island. Turtle Doves (above and below) are common on Menorca, but now rare in England Hoopoes are always fun to photograph Hoopoes are renowned for their insanitary nests, as the old birds don’t remove the faecal sacks. This probably explains why the Bible lists them as birds that are unclean and should not be eaten, though I doubt if they would be worth eating, anyway. I was unable to see into the nest I watched, so I don’t know how many chicks it held, or how old they were, but the adults were returning every five minutes or so with food for them. Nightingale (above and below): frequently heard,...
external.title: Menorca - Birding in the Balearics II

In England we are the very northern edge of the range of the Nightingale, but they are one of the commonest birds on Menorca, and you can hear their wonderful song almost anywhere on the island. Turtle Doves (above and below) are common on Menorca, but now rare in England Hoopoes are always fun to photograph Hoopoes are renowned for their insanitary nests, as the old birds don’t remove the faecal sacks. This probably explains why the Bible lists them as birds that are unclean and should not be eaten, though I doubt if they would be worth eating, anyway. I was unable to see into the nest I watched, so I don’t know how many chicks it held, or how old they were, but the adults were returning every five minutes or so with food for them. Nightingale (above and below): frequently heard,...
external.title: Menorca - Birding in the Balearics II

images.alt:
NATO Baltic Air Policing is a defensive mission safeguarding the airspace of Estonia, Latvia, and Lithuania through rotational deployments of allied fighter aircraft.
Mission Overview

Baltic Air Policing (BAP) is a NATO Quick Reaction Alert (QRA) mission established in 2004 after Estonia, Latvia, and Lithuania joined the Alliance. Its primary goal is to protect the airspace of the three Baltic states, which lack sufficient national air defense capabilities, by deploying allied fighter aircraft on a rotational basis from Šiauliai Air Base in Lithuania and Ämari Air Base in Estonia. The mission is purely defensive, ensuring airspace integrity and responding to potential airspace violations, often involving Russian aircraft approaching NATO airspace without transponders or flight plans WikipediaWikipedia+1.
Operational Structure

The mission operates under NATO’s Integrated Air Defence System (NATINADS), coordinated by the Combined Air Operations Centre (CAOC) in Uedem, Germany. Deployments typically include four fighter aircraft with 50–100 support personnel, rotating every four months. Participating NATO members provide aircraft and personnel, while the Baltic states contribute air command, control infrastructure, and logistical support WikipediaWikipedia+3.
Participating Nations and Aircraft

Since its inception, over 14 NATO members have contributed to BAP. Recent rotations include:

    Italian Air Force: F-35 and Eurofighter Typhoon at Ämari (Operation Baltic Eagle III, Aug 2025–Dec 2025)
    Portuguese Air Force: F-16 at Ämari (Apr–Jul 2026)
    French Air and Space Force: Rafale B at Šiauliai
    Romanian Air Force: F-16 at Šiauliai WikipediaWikipedia+3

AI活用って、最初からうまく使おうとすると急にハードルが上がる気がします。

この記事の「AI駆動開発は少しずつ成熟していく」という見方は、日常のAI利用にもそのまま使えそう。

まずは調査メモ、下書き、比較検討のどれか1つだけ。慣れてきたら次の作業へ、くらいがちょうどいいかもしれません。みなさんなら何から試しますか？

https://zenn.dev/kitsune_ceo/articles/bd389b7fd27040

AIに作業を任せる時って、便利そうなほど「どこまで許可していいの？」で止まりがちです。

Copilot CLIは調査・編集・検証まで任せられる一方で、無条件に許可するのは少し気になるところもある、という整理がしっくりきました。

今日試すなら、まず“調べものだけ”みたいに用途を絞るのがよさそう。みなさんなら何から試しますか？

https://zenn.dev/nozomu/articles/ddbda3456cf077

ロボット系の論文メモって、読む前から「自分には遠い話かも」と思いがちです。

でも今回気になったのは、ロボットそのものより「本番で動かす前に、どう手順やデモを集めるか」という考え方。

日常なら、毎回やっている作業を一度メモして、AIに手順・注意点・抜け漏れ確認にしてもらうのが試しやすそうです。まず何で試しますか？

https://zenn.dev/yokoshaan/articles/332123acf52454

テーマとして
「人間はどこまでコストをかけて
ハーネスやcontextを整えるのがいいか？匙加減は？」
があるよね

これはほしいアウトカムの品質と時間的な優先度によって
グラデーションで変わる

本件は趣味OSSのなかでも、
「無理にアウトカム出さなくていい。ほかの趣味やるから」
な領域なので、
放置していた

で
「昔は丁寧なハーネスやcontextを作らないとまわらなかったタスクが、
今は雑に投げて成功するようになった」
ので、今やってる

趣味OSS、

昔GitHub Copilot Coding Agentに雑に投げて
バグって放置していたいろいろなものを、
Codex gpt5.5 xhigh に投げつけて修正させている

「そうそう。話が通じるようになったやん」感がある

6/7コミティア156（東京ビッグサイト）赤井製作所はえ01abです
絵とまんがのほんの新しい刊があります　あと既刊いろいろ、アクリルフィギュア、3Dプリント物体などがあるもよう

ありがとうございます。
今まさに思ってることなんですけど、完璧なプロンプトじゃない方が良いんだろうなって。
人が付け加えたり、AIが曲解したりする要素を残した方が良いんですよ、たぶん。
それが個性になるし。
十二単の皆さんが作ってくれた作品を見て、そう感じました。
誰がどこで作っても同じになったら、それはもう僕らの物ではなくなってしまう。
なんて、ちょっと真面目に考えていました。

record.text: Lammy told JD Vance his remarks about Henry Nowak were ‘wrong’ – UK politics live

external.description:
The justice secretary said he spoke to the US vice president after he blamed mass immigration for Nowak’s murder

David Lammy said wherever there is “privilege” it can be “taken away if it doesn’t command the full confidence of the public”, when asked about the blade Vickrum Digwa used to murder Henry Nowak.

Asked whether it is “time to review the issue of whether the blade he (the killer) claims was religious, the 8in one, is permissible”, the justice secretary told Sky News:

I think it’s important to emphasise he claimed that. There is doubt as to whether this was religious, this 8in blade that was used, one, and two, you cannot carry a blade that is used in any way to harm life, that is illegal in our country, whatever the circumstances.

In the end, where exceptions are made of this kind, whether it’s for Scots or whether it’s for Sikhs. It is a privilege to be able to enjoy that with the confidence of the public.

I thought of my own sons around the same age. It brought back memories of George Floyd, of Stephen Lawrence. 

It was so painful, so harrowing, so horrendous – and my heart goes out to that family for the grace and dignity with which they are now having to conduct their lives sort of in the full lights basically of not just UK attention on this but now global attention on this desperate, desperate tragedy. Continue reading...

images.alt:
De cartoon toont drie mensen met smartphones. Bovenaan staat: “Zorgen onder de bevolking neemt toe: AI legt steeds grotere claim op onze energie en ons drinkwater…”. Links vraagt iemand aan ChatGPT hoe klimaatverandering en het energietekort kunnen worden opgelost. In het midden volgt een absurd antwoord: “Stop met het mij stellen van stompzinnige vragen en gebruik je eigen hersenen! Wil je dat ik een paar suggesties doe voor relevante opleidingen?” Rechts reageert iemand cynisch: “Wel uitkijken hè? Als zo’n AI-tool het antwoord niet weet, gaat-ie hallucineren…”

De cartoon verwijst naar twee actuele discussies: het hoge energie- en waterverbruik van AI-systemen en het fenomeen van “hallucinaties”, waarbij AI overtuigende maar onjuiste antwoorden kan geven.

De boodschap is: de samenleving investeert veel middelen in AI, terwijl betrouwbaarheid en meerwaarde ter discussie staan. De cartoon zegt dat mensen niet blind op AI moeten vertrouwen, maar zelf kritisch moeten blijven nadenken.

#cartoonjournaal #socialmedia #humor #nieuws #OngehoordNederland #ON #Vlemmix #desinformatie #racisme #extreemrechts #uitzendconcessie #licentie #omroep #PubliekeBestel

images.alt:
De cartoon reageert op een gezamenlijke oproep van omroepen om tegen Ongehoord Nederland op te treden. Bovenaan staat de kop: “Gezamenlijke aanval omroepen op Ongehoord Nederland: oproep aan minister tot nemen van ‘passende maatregelen’...”.

Links loopt Peter Vlemmix in een rood ON-shirt zelfverzekerd weg. Hij zegt: “Puh! Als jullie ons niet meer willen hebben, gaan we wel naar X, Telegram en YouTube.” Hiermee suggereert de tekenaar dat beperking van ON op traditionele media ertoe leidt dat het publiek uitwijkt naar sociale media.

Rechts staan twee toeschouwers. De vrouw zegt dat zij medelijden heeft met Peter Vlemmix. Peter reageert cynisch dat optreden tegen ON weinig zin heeft, omdat op X, Telegram en YouTube de verspreiding van desinformatie volgens hem nog groter is.

De boodschap van de cartoon is ironisch: maatregelen tegen ON worden voorgesteld als ineffectief of zelfs contraproductief. De tekenaar bekritiseert enerzijds de oproep van andere omroepen, maar laat anderzijds ook zien dat alternatieve platforms vaak juist minder controle kennen. Het contrast tussen censuur/ingrijpen en de uitwijkmogelijkheid naar sociale media vormt de kern van de satire.

#cartoonjournaal #nieuws #humor #socialmedia #extreemrechts #asielcrisis #pyromaan #ophitsing #relschopper #goudvis

images.alt:
De cartoon draagt als titel “Ideologie is decoratie…”. Centraal staat een vissenkom met twee goudvissen. Rond de kom lopen drie identieke, boos kijkende relschoppers. Hun uitspraken worden steeds extremer: eerst “Wij zijn Nederland!”, daarna “Weg met de dictatuur!” terwijl een Nederlandse vlag wordt gezwaaid, en tenslotte “We roken die gelukzoekers allemaal uit!” naast een nazivlag en een brandende fakkel.

Het beeld gebruikt een duidelijke tegenstelling. De relschoppers presenteren zich als patriotten en verdedigers van vrijheid, maar eindigen bij fascistische symbolen en uitsluitende taal. Daarmee suggereert de tekenaar dat hun ideologische argumenten slechts een façade zijn voor agressie en intolerantie. De titel ondersteunt dit: ideologie is volgens de cartoon slechts “decoratie” voor hun gedrag.

Onderaan staat de tekst: “De schrijver van deze tekst ziet het compleet verkeerd.” en rechts: “Inderdaad, goudvissen hebben meer politieke kennis dan relschoppers.” Deze ironische opmerkingen maken duidelijk dat de cartoonist relschoppers als politiek onwetend afschildert. De goudvissen fungeren als symbool voor meer verstand en inzicht dan de demonstranten. De boodschap is een scherpe kritiek op extremisme, xenofobie en gewelddadig protest.

Not ITS or robocars or bulbouts. All-ages bike facilities.

RIP Riley O’Neil.

i did a stained glass workshop today and in news that i'm sure will shock EVERYONE, i did NOT finish my project in the allotted 4 hours ✨ but the instructor let me go home with a roll of foil and we're gonna set up a time to meet up for me to solder with her 😅 also i cut up ALL of my fingertips 💁🏼‍♀️

images.alt: the table at my little station at the art studio where the stained glass workshop was held. in front of me are several small pieces of glass in yellows, oranges, and greens. also some markers, glass cutting tools, and a little stack of printouts of the d20 orange from my Diced Fruit enamel pin.
a photo of me standing at a small tabletop grinder, grinning super excitedly and grinding a teeny tiny triangle of orange glass. i have a nametag sticker on my lil pink tank top.

a closeup of my d20 orange with lots of different shades and textures of yellows and oranges for the rind and then dark and medium greens for the leaves. the pieces absolutely do not fit together or line up perfectly but it could probably be a lot worse!! they are all numbered with black sharpie and have arrows pointing upward because they are, notably, not soldered together. exactly one leaf piece has been wrapped in copper foil. this was three hours and fifty minutes into the four hour class and i was exactly zero percent surprised.
a selfie of me leaning over my unfinished piece (shown in the previous photo) and making a silly sad cry face
